series_metadata.series_description: This report and all associated documentation is initially provided by the Treasurer of State''s office and later verified by he Department of Taxation through generation of an electronic version of the cigarette stamp inventory report.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 3 years after the end of the calendar year for forms received during the calendar year or until such time as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular yera. ; Electronic: Destroy 3 yrs after the end of the calendar year for forms received during the calendar year or until such time as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
